description: Multi-zone LED support for marquees, underglow, and control panels

control_panel.behavior: Game-specific button colors, react to game selection

marquee.description: Backlit marquee or LED strip behind marquee
marquee.typical_controller: Separate LED-Wiz or RGB strip controller
marquee.behavior: Independent animation, can match game theme or run attract mode
marquee.channels: Usually separate device or upper channels

underglow.behavior: Ambient effects, can sync with music or game events

coin_door.behavior: Blink when credits available, solid when game running

animation_groups.description: Different zones can run independent animations simultaneously

single_controller.description: One LED-Wiz or PacLED64 for everything

dual_controller.description: PacLED64 for control panel, LED-Wiz for cabinet

implementation_notes: Each zone should have independent animation state
Zone assignments stored in config, user-editable
Fallback to control_panel zone if zone not configured
